'''Skritch''' was a small [[Gorm-worm/Legends|Gorm-worm]] kept as a pet by the [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Gudb]]. The tiny reptile took advantage of his venomous bite by killing [[Andur Sunrider]] at the order of [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] {{1st}}
